title: Pedigree Christmas Dog Stocking
features: 1x Pedigree Tasty Minis Chicken & Duck Flavour Chunks
description: Product description Pedigree Christmas stocking provides lots of treats for your canine friend over Christmas. Choose from 1x Pedigree Rodeo with Beef (4 pieces), 1x Pedigree Tasty Minis Chicken & Duck Flavour Chunks, 1x Pedigree Jumbone with Beef & Poultry and 1x Pedigree Dentastix Daily (3 chews) Perfect gift for your best friend this Christmas Indications Universal Directions Unwrap and give as a treat to your dog See more
